output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q2255032 wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name) , 'college football playoff national championship'))
  .
  ?award wdt:P585 ?year
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
output.formatted:
2018

```sparql
  ?award rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?name) , 'college football playoff national championship'))
  .
  ?award wdt:P585 ?year
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
```
